questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司在 Kubernetes 集群上运行本地应用程序。该公司最近增加了数百万新客户。该公司现有的本地基础设施无法处理大量新客户。该公司需要将本地应用程序迁移到AWS云上。该公司将迁移到 Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) 集群。该公司不想管理 AWS 上新架构的底层计算基础设施。哪种解决方案能够以最少的运营开销满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company runs an on-premises application on a Kubernetes cluster. The company recently added millions of new customers. The company's existing on-premises infrastructure is unable to handle the large number of new customers. The company needs to migrate the on-premises application to the AWS Cloud. The company will migrate to an Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) cluster. The company does not want to manage the underlying compute infrastructure for the new architecture on AWS. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

A.zh: 使用自我管理的节点来提供计算能力。将应用程序部署到新的 EKS 集群。
A.en: Use a self-managed node to supply compute capacity. Deploy the application to the new EKS cluster.

B.zh: 使用受管节点组提供计算容量。将应用程序部署到新的 EKS 集群。
B.en: Use managed node groups to supply compute capacity. Deploy the application to the new EKS cluster.

C.zh: 使用 AWS Fargate 提供计算容量。创建 Fargate 配置文件。使用 Fargate 配置文件部署应用程序。
C.en: Use AWS Fargate to supply compute capacity. Create a Fargate profile. Use the Fargate profile to deploy the application.

D.zh: 将托管节点组与 Karpenter 结合使用来提供计算容量。将应用程序部署到新的 EKS 集群。
D.en: Use managed node groups with Karpenter to supply compute capacity. Deploy the application to the new EKS cluster.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：自管理节点需要用户手动管理底层计算资源，包括EC2实例的启动、配置、控制和维护。这样就增加了运行开销，不满足问题所要求的“最小运行开销”。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Self-managed nodes require users to manually manage underlying computing resources, including the startup, configuration, control, and maintenance of EC2 instances. This increases the running overhead and does not meet the "minimum running overhead" required by the problem.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：该解决方案不能同时满足问题的关键性能、可用性、安全性、成本或操作约束，因此不是最佳选择。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This solution does not simultaneously satisfy the critical performance, availability, security, cost, or operational constraints of the problem and is therefore not the best choice.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因： AWS Fargate 是一种无服务器部署选项，无需管理底层部署资源。用户只需定义任务和服务， AWS自动处理资源分配和管理。这是运营开销最少的解决方案。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: AWS Fargate is a serverless deployment option that eliminates the need to manage underlying deployment resources. Users only need to define tasks and services, and AWS automatically handles resource allocation and management. This is the solution with the least operational overhead.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：该解决方案不能同时满足问题的关键性能、可用性、安全性、成本或操作约束，因此不是最佳选择。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This solution does not simultaneously satisfy the critical performance, availability, security, cost, or operational constraints of the problem and is therefore not the best choice.

answer_text.zh: C. 使用 AWS Fargate 提供计算容量。创建 Fargate 配置文件。使用 Fargate 配置文件部署应用程序。
answer_text.en: C. Use AWS Fargate to supply compute capacity. Create a Fargate profile. Use the Fargate profile to deploy the application.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： C (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要： AWS Fargate 是一种无服务器部署选项，无需管理底层部署资源。用户只需定义任务和服务， AWS自动处理资源分配和管理。这是运营开销最少的解决方案。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: AWS Fargate is a serverless deployment option that eliminates the need to manage underlying deployment resources. Users only need to define tasks and services, and AWS automatically handles resource allocation and management. This is the solution with the least operational overhead.

questions.domain: 領域 4：設計成本優化架構 (Design Cost-Optimized Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在推出一款新应用程序，该应用程序需要结构化数据库来存储用户配置文件、应用程序设置和事务数据。数据库必须能够随着应用程序流量进行扩展，并且必须提供备份。哪种解决方案能够最具成本效益地满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company is launching a new application that requires a structured database to store user profiles, application settings, and transactional data. The database must be scalable with application traffic and must offer backups. Which solution will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

A.zh: 使用开源软件在 Amazon EC2 实例上部署自管理数据库。使用 竞价型实例来优化成本。配置自动备份到 Amazon S3。
A.en: Deploy a self-managed database on Amazon EC2 instances by using open source software. Use Spot Instances for cost optimization. Configure automated backups to Amazon S3.

B.zh: 使用亚马逊 RDS。对具有通用 SSD 存储的数据库使用按需容量模式。配置自动备份，保留期为 7 天。
B.en: Use Amazon RDS. Use on-demand capacity mode for the database with General Purpose SSD storage. Configure automatic backups with a retention period of 7 days.

C.zh: 使用 Amazon Aurora Serverless 作为数据库。使用无服务器容量扩展。配置自动备份到 Amazon S3。
C.en: Use Amazon Aurora Serverless for the database. Use serverless capacity scaling. Configure automated backups to Amazon S3.

D.zh: 在 Amazon EC2 实例上部署自我管理的 NoSQL 数据库。使用预留实例来优化成本。将自动备份直接配置到 Amazon S3 Glacier 灵活检索。
D.en: Deploy a self-managed NoSQL database on Amazon EC2 instances. Use Reserved Instances for cost optimization. Configure automated backups directly to Amazon S3 Glacier Flexible Retrieval.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：由于管理费用较高，不符合“最具成本效益”的要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Due to higher administrative overhead, it does not meet the "most cost-effective" requirement.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：虽然 RDS 是一个不错的选择，但使用按需容量模型可能会导致比 Aurora Serverless 更高的成本，特别是在流量大幅波动的情况下。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: While RDS is a good choice, using an on-demand capacity model may result in higher costs than Aurora Serverless, especially if traffic fluctuates significantly.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：最能满足问题要求的“最具成本效益”的解决方案。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: The “most cost-effective” solution that best meets the requirements of the problem.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：“结构化数据库”和“最具成本效益”的解决方案并不能解决问题。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: "Structured databases" and "most cost-effective" solutions don't fit the problem.

answer_text.zh: C. 使用 Amazon Aurora Serverless 作为数据库。使用无服务器容量扩展。配置自动备份到 Amazon S3。
answer_text.en: C. Use Amazon Aurora Serverless for the database. Use serverless capacity scaling. Configure automated backups to Amazon S3.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： C (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：最能满足问题要求的“最具成本效益”的解决方案。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: The “most cost-effective” solution that best meets the requirements of the problem.

questions.domain: 領域 1：設計彈性架構 (Design Resilient Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司在 AWS 上运行其旧版 Web 应用程序。 Web 应用程序服务器在 VPC 公有子网中的 Amazon EC2 实例上运行。 Web 应用程序服务器从客户收集图像并将图像文件存储在本地连接的 Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) 卷中。图像文件每天晚上上传到 Amazon S3 存储桶进行备份。解决方案架构师发现图像文件正在通过公共终端节点上传到 Amazon S3。解决方案架构师需要确保流向 Amazon S3 的流量不使用公共终端节点。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company runs its legacy web application on AWS. The web application server runs on an Amazon EC2 instance in the public subnet of a VPC. The web application server collects images from customers and stores the image files in a locally attached Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) volume. The image files are uploaded every night to an Amazon S3 bucket for backup. A solutions architect discovers that the image files are being uploaded to Amazon S3 through the public endpoint. The solutions architect needs to ensure that traffic to Amazon S3 does not use the public endpoint. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 为具有 VPC 必要权限的 S3 存储桶创建网关 VPC 终端节点。配置子网络由表以使用网关 VPC 终端节点。
A.en: Create a gateway VPC endpoint for the S3 bucket that has the necessary permissions for the VPC. Configure the subnet route table to use the gateway VPC endpoint.

B.zh: 将 S3 存储桶移至 VPC 内。配置子网络由表以通过私有 IP 地址访问 S3 存储桶。
B.en: Move the S3 bucket inside the VPC. Configure the subnet route table to access the S3 bucket through private IP addresses.

C.zh: 为 VP 内的 Amazon EC2 实例创建 Amazon S3 访问点将 Web 应用程序配置为使用 Amazon S3 访问点上传。
C.en: Create an Amazon S3 access point for the Amazon EC2 instance inside the VPConfigure the web application to upload by using the Amazon S3 access point.

D.zh: 在具有 Amazon EC2 实例的 VPC 和 Amazon S3 之间配置 AWS Direct Connect 连接，以提供专用网络路径。
D.en: Configure an AWS Direct Connect connection between the VPC that has the Amazon EC2 instance and Amazon S3 to provide a dedicated network path.

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：网关 VPC 终端节点允许流量直接通过专用网络访问 Amazon S3，而无需通过公共终端节点。通过配置子网路由表，流量可以通过VPC Endpoint访问S3，满足问题需求。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: The Gateway VPC endpoint allows traffic to access Amazon S3 directly over the private network without going through the public endpoint. By configuring the subnet routing table, traffic can access S3 through the VPC Endpoint, meeting the problem requirements.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： S3 是区域服务，无法直接“移动”到 VPC 中。即使配置了私有IP地址， S3的架构设计也不支持这种方式。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: S3 is a regional service and cannot be "moved" directly into a VPC. Even if a private IP address is configured, the architectural design of S3 does not support this approach.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： S3 Access Point 是一种大规模简化数据访问的工具，但它仍然依赖于公共端点或VPC Endpoint。该问题需要避免公共端点，并且此选项不能解决问题。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: S3 Access Point is a tool that simplifies data access at scale, but it still relies on the public endpoint 𪥿VPC Endpoint. The problem requires avoiding public endpoints, and this option doesn't solve the problem.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： Direct Connect 主要用于将本地数据连接到 AWS，而不是解决内部 VPC 流量问题。该选项过于复杂且成本高昂，并且不能满足作为简单解决方案的问题的要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Direct Connect is primarily used to connect on-premises data to AWS rather than solving internal VPC traffic issues. This option is overly complex and costly and does not meet the requirements of the problem as a simple solution.

answer_text.zh: A. 为具有 VPC 必要权限的 S3 存储桶创建网关 VPC 终端节点。配置子网络由表以使用网关 VPC 终端节点。
answer_text.en: A. Create a gateway VPC endpoint for the S3 bucket that has the necessary permissions for the VPC. Configure the subnet route table to use the gateway VPC endpoint.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： A (73%) C (27%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：网关 VPC 终端节点允许流量直接通过专用网络访问 Amazon S3，而无需通过公共终端节点。通过配置子网路由表，流量可以通过VPC Endpoint访问S3，满足问题需求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (73%) C (27%). Popular discussion and key point summary: The Gateway VPC endpoint allows traffic to access Amazon S3 directly over the private network without going through the public endpoint. By configuring the subnet routing table, traffic can access S3 through the VPC Endpoint, meeting the problem requirements.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在 AWS 上创建电子商务网站的原型。该网站由应用程序负载均衡器、用于 Web 服务器的 Amazon EC2 实例 Auto Scaling 组以及使用单可用区配置运行的 Amazon RDS for MySQL 数据库实例组成。搜索产品目录时网站响应缓慢。产品目录是MySQL数据库中公司不经常更新的一组表。解决方案架构师确定，当进行产品目录搜索时，数据库实例上的 CPU 利用率很高。解决方案架构师应该建议什么来提高产品目录搜索期间网站的性能？
question_text.en: A company is creating a prototype of an ecommerce website on AWS. The website consists of an Application Load Balancer, an Auto Scaling group of Amazon EC2 instances for web servers, and an Amazon RDS for MySQL DB instance that runs with the Single-AZ configuration. The website is slow to respond during searches of the product catalog. The product catalog is a group of tables in the MySQL database that the company does not update frequently. A solutions architect has determined that the CPU utilization on the DB instance is high when product catalog searches occur. What should the solutions architect recommend to improve the performance of the website during searches of the product catalog?

A.zh: 将产品目录迁移到 Amazon Redshift 数据库。使用 COPY 命令加载产品目录表。
A.en: Migrate the product catalog to an Amazon Redshift database. Use the COPY command to load the product catalog tables.

B.zh: 实施 Amazon ElastiCache for Redis 集群来缓存产品目录。使用延迟加载来填充缓存。
B.en: Implement an Amazon ElastiCache for Redis cluster to cache the product catalog. Use lazy loading to populate the cache.

C.zh: 向 Auto Scaling 组添加额外的扩展策略，以便在数据库响应缓慢时启动额外的 EC2 实例。
C.en: Add an additional scaling policy to the Auto Scaling group to launch additional EC2 instances when database response is slow.

D.zh: 为数据库实例启用多可用区配置。配置 EC2 实例以限制发送到数据库的产品目录查询。
D.en: Turn on the Multi-AZ configuration for the DB instance. Configure the EC2 instances to throttle the product catalog queries that are sent to the database.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： Amazon Redshift 是专门为数据仓库设计的服务，适合处理分析查询而不是事务查询。产品目录查询通常是事务性查询，迁移到Redshift并不能有效解决问题。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon Redshift is a service designed specifically for data warehouses and is suitable for handling analytical queries rather than transactional queries. Product catalog queries are usually transactional queries, and migrating to Redshift does not effectively solve the problem.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：使用 Amazon ElastiCache 可以降低数据库上的 CPU 负载，并通过减慢频繁查询的数据（例如产品项）速度并减少对数据库的直接访问来提高查询性能。延迟加载是一种常见的缓存填充策略，可以在需要时动态地将数据加载到缓存中。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: Using Amazon ElastiCache can reduce the CPU load on your database and improve query performance by slowing down frequently queried data (such as product items) and reducing direct access to the database. Lazy loading is a common cache filling strategy that dynamically loads data into the cache when needed.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：增加EC2实例数量并不能直接解决数据库性能问题，因为问题的根源是数据库的CPU利用率高，而不是Web服务器的负载。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Increasing the number of EC2 instances does not directly solve the database performance problem, because the root of the problem is high CPU utilization of the database, not the load of the web server.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：启用多可用区配置可以提高数据库可用性，但不会直接提高查询性能。限制查询可能会进一步降低用户体验。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Enabling a multi-AZ configuration improves database availability but does not directly improve query performance. Limiting queries may further degrade the user experience.

answer_text.zh: B. 实施 Amazon ElastiCache for Redis 集群来缓存产品目录。使用延迟加载来填充缓存。
answer_text.en: B. Implement an Amazon ElastiCache for Redis cluster to cache the product catalog. Use lazy loading to populate the cache.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： B (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：使用 Amazon ElastiCache 可以降低数据库上的 CPU 负载，并通过减慢频繁查询的数据（例如产品项）速度并减少对数据库的直接访问来提高查询性能。延迟加载是一种常见的缓存填充策略，可以在需要时动态地将数据加载到缓存中。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Using Amazon ElastiCache can reduce the CPU load on your database and improve query performance by slowing down frequently queried data (such as product items) and reducing direct access to the database. Lazy loading is a common cache filling strategy that dynamically loads data into the cache when needed.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司目前在本地块存储系统中存储了 5 TB 的数据。该公司当前的存储解决方案为额外数据提供的空间有限。该公司在本地运行的应用程序必须能够以低延迟检索频繁访问的数据。该公司需要基于云的存储解决方案。哪种解决方案能够以最高的运营效率满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company currently stores 5 TB of data in on-premises block storage systems. The company's current storage solution provides limited space for additional data. The company runs applications on premises that must be able to retrieve frequently accessed data with low latency. The company requires a cloud-based storage solution. Which solution will meet these requirements with the MOST operational efficiency?

A.zh: 使用 Amazon S3 文件网关。将 S3 文件网关与本地应用程序集成，以使用 SMB 文件系统存储和直接检索文件。
A.en: Use Amazon S3 File Gateway. Integrate S3 File Gateway with the on-premises applications to store and directly retrieve files by using the SMB file system.

B.zh: 使用 AWS Storage Gateway 卷网关并将缓存卷作为 iSCSI 目标。
B.en: Use an AWS Storage Gateway Volume Gateway with cached volumes as iSCSI targets.

C.zh: 使用 AWS Storage Gateway 卷网关并将存储卷作为 iSCSI 目标。
C.en: Use an AWS Storage Gateway Volume Gateway with stored volumes as iSCSI targets.

D.zh: 使用 AWS Storage Gateway 磁带网关。将磁带网关与本地应用程序集成以在 Amazon S3 中存储虚拟磁带。
D.en: Use an AWS Storage Gateway Tape Gateway. Integrate Tape Gateway with the on-premises applications to store virtual tapes in Amazon S3.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：技术分析： S3文件网关适用于文件存储场景，支持通过SMB或NFS协议访问文件。但问题是需要低延迟访问，而S3文件网关的访问延迟可能较高，无法完全满足频繁访问和低延迟的需求。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Technical analysis: S3 file gateway is suitable for file storage scenarios and supports accessing files through SMB or NFS protocols. But the problem is that low-latency access is required, and the access latency of the S3 file gateway may be high, which cannot fully meet the needs of frequent access and low latency.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：技术分析： Volume Gateway的缓存卷模式可以将经常访问的数据保存在本地，同时将数据备份到云。这种方法可以提供低延迟访问，同时满足云存储需求。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: Technical analysis: Volume Gateway's cache volume mode can save frequently accessed data locally while backing up data to the cloud. This approach can provide low-latency access while meeting cloud storage needs.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：技术分析：存储卷模式将所有数据存储在本地，并定期备份到云。这种方式适合需要本地存储为主的场景，但问题是需要云集成和低延迟访问，所以并不能完全满足要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Technical analysis: Storage volume mode stores all data locally and backs it up to the cloud regularly. This method is suitable for scenarios that require local storage as the main focus, but the problem is that it requires cloud integration and low-latency access, so it does not fully meet the requirements.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：技术分析：磁带网关主要应用于备份、归档场景，适合替代传统磁带库。这些问题需要频繁访问和低延迟，这与磁带网关的设计目标不符。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Technical analysis: Tape gateway is mainly used in backup and archiving scenarios, and is suitable for replacing traditional tape libraries. These issues require frequent access and low latency, which is inconsistent with the tape gateway's design goals.

answer_text.zh: B. 使用 AWS Storage Gateway 卷网关并将缓存卷作为 iSCSI 目标。
answer_text.en: B. Use an AWS Storage Gateway Volume Gateway with cached volumes as iSCSI targets.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： B (82%) C (18%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：技术分析： Volume Gateway的缓存卷模式可以将经常访问的数据保存在本地，同时将数据备份到云。这种方法可以提供低延迟访问，同时满足云存储需求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (82%) C (18%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Technical analysis: Volume Gateway's cache volume mode can save frequently accessed data locally while backing up data to the cloud. This approach can provide low-latency access while meeting cloud storage needs.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司经营送餐服务。由于最近的增长，该公司的订单处理系统在高峰流量时段遇到了扩展问题。当前架构包括 Auto Scaling 组中的 Amazon EC2 实例，用于从应用程序收集订单。 Auto Scaling 组中的第二组 EC2 实例履行订单。订单收集过程发生得很快，但订单履行过程可能需要更长的时间。数据不得因缩放事件而丢失。解决方案架构师必须确保订单收集流程和订单履行流程都能在高峰流量时段充分扩展。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company operates a food delivery service. Because of recent growth, the company's order processing system is experiencing scaling problems during peak traffic hours. The current architecture includes Amazon EC2 instances in an Auto Scaling group that collect orders from an application. A second group of EC2 instances in an Auto Scaling group fulfills the orders. The order collection process occurs quickly, but the order fulfillment process can take longer. Data must not be lost because of a scaling event. A solutions architect must ensure that the order collection process and the order fulfillment process can both scale adequately during peak traffic hours. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 使用 Amazon CloudWatch 监控两个 Auto Scaling 组中每个实例的 CPUUtilization 指标。配置每个 Auto Scaling 组的最小容量以满足其峰值工作负载值。
A.en: Use Amazon CloudWatch to monitor the CPUUtilization metric for each instance in both Auto Scaling groups. Configure each Auto Scaling group's minimum capacity to meet its peak workload value.

B.zh: 使用 Amazon CloudWatch 监控两个 Auto Scaling 组中每个实例的 CPUUtilization 指标。配置 CloudWatch 警报以调用 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 主题，从而根据需要创建其他 Auto Scaling 组。
B.en: Use Amazon CloudWatch to monitor the CPUUtilization metric for each instance in both Auto Scaling groups. Configure a CloudWatch alarm to invoke an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic to create additional Auto Scaling groups on demand.

C.zh: 预置两个 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) 队列。使用一个SQS队列进行订单收集。使用第二个 SQS 队列来履行订单。配置 EC2 实例以轮询其各自的队列。根据队列发送的通知扩展 Auto Scaling 组。
C.en: Provision two Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queues. Use one SQS queue for order collection. Use the second SQS queue for order fulfillment. Configure the EC2 instances to poll their respective queues. Scale the Auto Scaling groups based on notifications that the queues send.

D.zh: 预置两个 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) 队列。使用一个SQS队列进行订单收集。使用第二个 SQS 队列来履行订单。配置 EC2 实例以轮询其各自的队列。根据每个队列中的消息数量扩展 Auto Scaling 组。
D.en: Provision two Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queues. Use one SQS queue for order collection. Use the second SQS queue for order fulfillment. Configure the EC2 instances to poll their respective queues. Scale the Auto Scaling groups based on the number of messages in each queue.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：使用 Amazon CloudWatch 监控 CPUUtilization 并设置最小容量：错误。虽然CPUUtilization是常用的方法，但只有设置最小容量才能解决订单处理速度不同步的问题，并保证数据不会丢失。这种方法动态调整资源以应对流量波动。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Using Amazon CloudWatch to monitor CPUUtilization and set minimum capacity: Error. Although CPUUtilization is a common method, only setting the minimum capacity can solve the problem of out-of-sync order processing speed and ensure that data will not be lost. This approach dynamically adjusts resources to cope with traffic fluctuations.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：使用 CloudWatch 警报和 SNS 创建其他 Auto Scaling 组：错误。创建额外的 Auto Scaling 组并不能解决订单处理速度不同步的问题，也不能保证数据不会丢失。该规则很复杂并且不遵循最佳实践。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Creating additional Auto Scaling groups using CloudWatch alarms and SNS: Error. Creating additional Auto Scaling groups does not solve the problem of out-of-sync order processing speeds and does not guarantee that data will not be lost. The rule is complex and does not follow best practices.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：使用两个 SQS 队列并根据通知扩展 Auto Scaling 组：错误。虽然使用SQS队列是正确的方向，但基于通知扩展Auto Scaling组并不能直接反映队列中的消息数量，这可能会导致资源分配不准确。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Using two SQS queues and scaling an Auto Scaling group based on notifications: Error. While using SQS queues is the right direction, scaling Auto Scaling groups based on notifications does not directly reflect the number of messages in the queue, which can lead to inaccurate resource allocation.

D.zh: 正確。技术原因：使用两个 SQS 队列并根据队列中的消息数量扩展 Auto Scaling 组：正确。该解决方案使用 SQS 队列来解耦订单收集和订单履行流程，并根据队列中的消息数量动态扩展 Auto Scaling 组，以确保其能够处理峰值流量而不丢失数据。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: Use two SQS queues and scale the Auto Scaling group based on the number of messages in the queue: Correct. The solution uses SQS queues to decouple the order collection and order fulfillment processes, and dynamically scales Auto Scaling groups based on the number of messages in the queue to ensure it can handle peak traffic without losing data.

answer_text.zh: D. 预置两个 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) 队列。使用一个SQS队列进行订单收集。使用第二个 SQS 队列来履行订单。配置 EC2 实例以轮询其各自的队列。根据每个队列中的消息数量扩展 Auto Scaling 组。
answer_text.en: D. Provision two Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queues. Use one SQS queue for order collection. Use the second SQS queue for order fulfillment. Configure the EC2 instances to poll their respective queues. Scale the Auto Scaling groups based on the number of messages in each queue.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： D (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：使用两个 SQS 队列并根据队列中的消息数量扩展 Auto Scaling 组：正确。该解决方案使用 SQS 队列来解耦订单收集和订单履行流程，并根据队列中的消息数量动态扩展 Auto Scaling 组，以确保其能够处理峰值流量而不丢失数据。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Use two SQS queues and scale the Auto Scaling group based on the number of messages in the queue: Correct. The solution uses SQS queues to decouple the order collection and order fulfillment processes, and dynamically scales Auto Scaling groups based on the number of messages in the queue to ensure it can handle peak traffic without losing data.

questions.domain: 領域 4：設計成本優化架構 (Design Cost-Optimized Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家在线游戏公司正在将用户数据存储迁移到 Amazon DynamoDB，以支持公司不断增长的用户群。当前架构包括 DynamoDB 表，其中包含用户个人数据、成就和游戏内交易。该公司需要设计一个强大、持续可用且有弹性的 DynamoDB 架构，以维持用户的无缝游戏体验。哪种解决方案能够最具成本效益地满足这些要求？
question_text.en: An online gaming company is transitioning user data storage to Amazon DynamoDB to support the company's growing user base. The current architecture includes DynamoDB tables that contain user profiles, achievements, and in-game transactions. The company needs to design a robust, continuously available, and resilient DynamoDB architecture to maintain a seamless gaming experience for users. Which solution will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

A.zh: 在单个 AWS 区域中创建 DynamoDB 表。使用按需容量模式。使用全局表跨多个区域复制数据。
A.en: Create DynamoDB tables in a single AWS Region. Use on-demand capacity mode. Use global tables to replicate data across multiple Regions.

B.zh: 使用 DynamoDB Accelerator (DAX) 缓存经常访问的数据。在单个 AWS 区域中部署表并启用自动扩展。手动配置跨区域复制到其他区域。
B.en: Use DynamoDB Accelerator (DAX) to cache frequently accessed data. Deploy tables in a single AWS Region and enable auto scaling. Configure Cross-Region Replication manually to additional Regions.

C.zh: 在多个 AWS 区域中创建 DynamoDB 表。使用按需容量模式。使用 DynamoDB Streams 在区域之间进行跨区域复制。
C.en: Create DynamoDB tables in multiple AWS Regions. Use on-demand capacity mode. Use DynamoDB Streams for Cross- Region Replication between Regions.

D.zh: 使用 DynamoDB 全局表进行自动多区域复制。在多个 AWS 区域部署表。使用预配置容量模式。启用Auto Scaling。
D.en: Use DynamoDB global tables for automatic multi-Region replication. Deploy tables in multiple AWS Regions. Use provisioned capacity mode. Enable auto scaling.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：技术分析：这个选项提到了使用全局表进行跨地域复制，但是全局表需要在多个地域创建表，而不是单个地域。此外，按需容量模型虽然灵活，但在大流量场景下可能会很昂贵。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Technical analysis: This option mentions using global tables for cross-region replication, but global tables require tables to be created in multiple regions instead of a single region. In addition, the on-demand capacity model, although flexible, may be expensive in heavy traffic scenarios.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：技术分析： DAX可以提升读取性能，但是并没有解决跨区域复制的问题。手动配置跨区域复制复杂且容易出错，无法满足“持续可用性”和“弹性”的要求。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Technical analysis: DAX can improve read performance, but it does not solve the problem of cross-region replication. Manually configuring cross-region replication is complex and error-prone, and cannot meet the requirements of "continuous availability" and "resilience."

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：技术分析：使用DynamoDB Streams进行跨区域复制需要额外的管理工作，并且不如全局表自动化和高效。此外，按需容量模型在高流量场景中可能会更昂贵。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Technical analysis: Using DynamoDB Streams for cross-region replication requires additional management work and is not as automated and efficient as global tables. Additionally, the on-demand capacity model may be more expensive in high-traffic scenarios.

D.zh: 正確。技术原因：技术分析：全局表提供自动化的多区域复制，保证高可用和容错。默认容量模式结合自动扩容可以在成本和性能之间获取平衡，是最符合问题需求的解决方案。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: Technical analysis: Global tables provide automated multi-region replication to ensure high availability and fault tolerance. The preset capacity mode combined with automatic expansion can strike a balance between cost and performance and is the solution that best meets the problem requirements.

answer_text.zh: D. 使用 DynamoDB 全局表进行自动多区域复制。在多个 AWS 区域部署表。使用预配置容量模式。启用Auto Scaling。
answer_text.en: D. Use DynamoDB global tables for automatic multi-Region replication. Deploy tables in multiple AWS Regions. Use provisioned capacity mode. Enable auto scaling.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： D (92%) 8%。热门讨论与考点摘要：技术分析：全局表提供自动化的多区域复制，保证高可用和容错。默认容量模式结合自动扩容可以在成本和性能之间获取平衡，是最符合问题需求的解决方案。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (92%) 8%. Popular discussion and key point summary: Technical analysis: Global tables provide automated multi-region replication to ensure high availability and fault tolerance. The preset capacity mode combined with automatic expansion can strike a balance between cost and performance and is the solution that best meets the problem requirements.

questions.domain: 領域 4：設計成本優化架構 (Design Cost-Optimized Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司在本地运行其媒体渲染应用程序。该公司希望降低存储成本，并将所有数据转移到 Amazon S3。本地渲染应用程序需要低延迟地访问存储。该公司需要为该应用程序设计一个存储解决方案。存储解决方案必须保持所需的应用程序性能。哪种存储解决方案能够以最具成本效益的方式满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company runs its media rendering application on premises. The company wants to reduce storage costs and has moved all data to Amazon S3. The on-premises rendering application needs low-latency access to storage. The company needs to design a storage solution for the application. The storage solution must maintain the desired application performance. Which storage solution will meet these requirements in the MOST cost-effective way?

A.zh: 使用 Mountpoint for Amazon S3 访问 Amazon S3 中本地应用程序的数据。
A.en: Use Mountpoint for Amazon S3 to access the data in Amazon S3 for the on-premises application.

B.zh: 配置 Amazon S3 文件网关以为本地应用程序提供存储。
B.en: Configure an Amazon S3 File Gateway to provide storage for the on-premises application.

C.zh: 将数据从 Amazon S3 复制到 Amazon FSx for Windows File Server。配置 Amazon FSx 文件网关以为本地应用程序提供存储。
C.en: Copy the data from Amazon S3 to Amazon FSx for Windows File Server. Configure an Amazon FSx File Gateway to provide storage for the on-premises application.

D.zh: 配置本地文件服务器。使用 Amazon S3 API 连接到 S3 存储。配置应用程序以从本地文件服务器访问存储。
D.en: Configure an on-premises file server. Use the Amazon S3 API to connect to S3 storage. Configure the application to access the storage from the on-premises file server.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：该解决方案不能同时满足问题的关键性能、可用性、安全性、成本或操作约束，因此不是最佳选择。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This solution does not simultaneously satisfy the critical performance, availability, security, cost, or operational constraints of the problem and is therefore not the best choice.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：该解决方案满足问题中的关键功能和非功能需求，并且与相关AWS服务的设计意图和最佳实践一致。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: The solution meets the key functional and non-functional requirements in the problem and is consistent with the design intent and best practices of the relevant AWS service.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：该解决方案无法同时满足问题中的关键性能、可用性、安全性、成本或操作约束，因此不是最佳选择。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This solution cannot simultaneously satisfy the critical performance, availability, security, cost, or operational constraints in the problem and is therefore not the best choice.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：该解决方案不能同时满足问题的关键性能、可用性、安全性、成本或操作约束，因此不是最佳选择。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This solution does not simultaneously satisfy the critical performance, availability, security, cost, or operational constraints of the problem and is therefore not the best choice.

answer_text.zh: B. 配置 Amazon S3 文件网关以为本地应用程序提供存储。
answer_text.en: B. Configure an Amazon S3 File Gateway to provide storage for the on-premises application.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： B (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：该解决方案满足问题中的关键功能和非功能需求，并且与相关AWS服务的设计意图和最佳实践一致。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: The solution meets the key functional and non-functional requirements in the problem and is consistent with the design intent and best practices of the relevant AWS service.

questions.domain: 領域 4：設計成本優化架構 (Design Cost-Optimized Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司在 us-east-1 区域托管其企业资源规划 (ERP) 系统。该系统在 Amazon EC2 实例上运行。客户使用 EC2 实例上托管的公共 API 与 ERP 系统交换信息。国际客户报告其数据中心的 API 响应时间缓慢。哪种解决方案能够最具成本效益地缩短国际客户的响应时间？
question_text.en: A company hosts its enterprise resource planning (ERP) system in the us-east-1 Region. The system runs on Amazon EC2 instances. Customers use a public API that is hosted on the EC2 instances to exchange information with the ERP system. International customers report slow API response times from their data centers. Which solution will improve response times for the international customers MOST cost-effectively?

A.zh: 创建具有公共虚拟接口 (VIF) 的 AWS Direct Connect 连接，以提供从每个客户的数据中心到 us-east-1 的连接。使用 Direct Connect 网关将客户 API 请求路由到 ERP 系统 API。
A.en: Create an AWS Direct Connect connection that has a public virtual interface (VIF) to provide connectivity from each customer's data center to us-east-1. Route customer API requests by using a Direct Connect gateway to the ERP system API.

B.zh: 在 API 前面设置 Amazon CloudFront 分配。配置 CachingOptimized 托管缓存策略以提高缓存效率。
B.en: Set up an Amazon CloudFront distribution in front of the API. Configure the CachingOptimized managed cache policy to provide improved cache efficiency.

C.zh: 设置 AWS 全球加速器。为必要的端口配置侦听器。为适当的区域配置终端节点组以分配流量。在组中为 API 创建端点。
C.en: Set up AWS Global Accelerator. Configure listeners for the necessary ports. Configure endpoint groups for the appropriate Regions to distribute traffic. Create an endpoint in the group for the API.

D.zh: 使用 AWS Site-to-Site VPN 在区域和客户网络之间建立专用 VPN 隧道。通过 VPN 连接将流量路由到 API。
D.en: Use AWS Site-to-Site VPN to establish dedicated VPN tunnels between Regions and customer networks. Route traffic to the API over the VPN connections.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：专线连接提供专线连接，适用于需要高带宽、低时延的场景。但成本较高，客户需要在自己的数据中心建立专线连接。对于国际客户来说，建立 Direct Connect 可能并不划算，尤其是在需要多个客户建立单独连接的情况下。因此，虽然此选项可能会提高性能，但它不符合“最具成本效益”的要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Dedicated line connection provides dedicated line connection, which is suitable for scenarios that require high bandwidth and low latency. However, the cost is high and customers need to establish a dedicated line connection in their own data center. For international customers, setting up Direct Connect may not be cost-effective, especially if multiple customers are required to establish separate connections. So while this option may improve performance, it doesn't meet the "most cost-effective" requirement.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： CloudFront 是一个内容分发网络 (CDN)，可缓存静态内容以加快分发速度，但对于动态 API 请求，缓存效率有限。虽然 CloudFront 可以实现一些性能改进，但动态 API 请求的响应时间改进是有限的，并且不能解决国际客户的延迟问题。因此，这个选项并不完全适合解决问题。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: CloudFront is a content delivery network (CDN) that caches static content for faster delivery, but the caching efficiency is limited for dynamic API requests. While some performance improvements are possible with CloudFront, response time improvements for dynamic API requests are limited and do not address latency issues for international customers. Therefore, this option is not entirely suitable for solving the problem.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因： AWS Global Accelerator 是一项专门设计用于优化对世界各地用户的访问、通过使用 AWS 全球网络减少延迟的服务。它为 API 请求等动态内容提供加速，并通过侦听器和端点组将流量分配到最近的区域，从而显著缩短国际客户的响应时间。此选项满足“最具成本效益”的要求，同时解决国际客户的延迟问题。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: AWS Global Accelerator is a service specifically designed to optimize access to users around the world, reducing latency by using the AWS global network. It provides acceleration for dynamic content such as API requests and distributes traffic to the nearest region through listeners and endpoint groups, significantly improving response times for international customers. This option meets the "most cost-effective" requirement while resolving latency issues for international customers.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：站点到站点 VPN 提供安全连接，但它通常用于内部公司网络之间的通信，并且未针对访问公共 API 的国际客户进行优化。 VPN 性能可能会受到网络带宽和延迟的限制，并且需要客户在其数据中心建立昂贵的 VPN 连接。因此，该选项不适合解决该问题。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Site-to-site VPN provides a secure connection, but it is typically used for communication between internal corporate networks and is not optimized for international customers accessing public APIs. VPN performance can be limited by network bandwidth and latency, and requires customers to establish costly VPN connections in their data centers. Therefore, this option is not suitable for solving this problem.

answer_text.zh: C. 设置 AWS 全球加速器。为必要的端口配置侦听器。为适当的区域配置终端节点组以分配流量。在组中为 API 创建端点。
answer_text.en: C. Set up AWS Global Accelerator. Configure listeners for the necessary ports. Configure endpoint groups for the appropriate Regions to distribute traffic. Create an endpoint in the group for the API.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： C (60%) B (40%)。热门讨论与考点摘要： AWS Global Accelerator 是一项专门设计用于优化对世界各地用户的访问、通过使用 AWS 全球网络减少延迟的服务。它为 API 请求等动态内容提供加速，并通过侦听器和端点组将流量分配到最近的区域，从而显著缩短国际客户的响应时间。此选项满足“最具成本效益”的要求，同时解决国际客户的延迟问题。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (60%) B (40%). Popular discussion and key point summary: AWS Global Accelerator is a service specifically designed to optimize access to users around the world, reducing latency by using the AWS global network. It provides acceleration for dynamic content such as API requests and distributes traffic to the nearest region through listeners and endpoint groups, significantly improving response times for international customers. This option meets the "most cost-effective" requirement while resolving latency issues for international customers.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司通过在其网站上进行的调查来跟踪客户满意度。有时每小时都会有数千名客户接受调查。目前，调查结果通过电子邮件发送给公司，以便公司员工可以手动查看结果并评估客户情绪。该公司希望实现客户调查流程的自动化。必须提供过去 12 个月的调查结果。哪种解决方案能够以最具可扩展性的方式满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company tracks customer satisfaction by using surveys that the company hosts on its website. The surveys sometimes reach thousands of customers every hour. Survey results are currently sent in email messages to the company so company employees can manually review results and assess customer sentiment. The company wants to automate the customer survey process. Survey results must be available for the previous 12 months. Which solution will meet these requirements in the MOST scalable way?

A.zh: 将调查结果数据发送到连接到 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) 队列的 Amazon API Gateway 终端节点。创建一个 AWS Lambda 函数来轮询 SQS 队列，调用 Amazon Comprehend 进行情绪分析，并将结果保存到 Amazon DynamoDB 表。将所有记录的 TTL 设置为未来 365 天。
A.en: Send the survey results data to an Amazon API Gateway endpoint that is connected to an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue. Create an AWS Lambda function to poll the SQS queue, call Amazon Comprehend for sentiment analysis, and save the results to an Amazon DynamoDB table. Set the TTL for all records to 365 days in the future.

B.zh: 将调查结果数据发送到在 Amazon EC2 实例上运行的 API。配置 API 以将调查结果存储为 Amazon DynamoDB 表中的新记录，调用 Amazon Comprehend 进行情绪分析，并将结果保存在第二个 DynamoDB 表中。将所有记录的 TTL 设置为未来 365 天。
B.en: Send the survey results data to an API that is running on an Amazon EC2 instance. Configure the API to store the survey results as a new record in an Amazon DynamoDB table, call Amazon Comprehend for sentiment analysis, and save the results in a second DynamoDB table. Set the TTL for all records to 365 days in the future.

C.zh: 将调查结果数据写入 Amazon S3 存储桶。使用 S3 事件通知调用 AWS Lambda 函数来读取数据并调用 Amazon Rekognition 进行情绪分析。将情感分析结果存储在第二个 S3 存储桶中。对每个存储桶使用 S3 生命周期策略，使对象在 365 天后过期。
C.en: Write the survey results data to an Amazon S3 bucket. Use S3 Event Notifications to invoke an AWS Lambda function to read the data and call Amazon Rekognition for sentiment analysis. Store the sentiment analysis results in a second S3 bucket. Use S3 lifecycle policies on each bucket to expire objects after 365 days.

D.zh: 将调查结果数据发送到连接到 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) 队列的 Amazon API Gateway 终端节点。配置 SQS 队列以调用 AWS Lambda 函数，该函数调用 Amazon Lex 进行情绪分析并将结果保存到 Amazon DynamoDB 表。将所有记录的 TTL 设置为未来 365 天。
D.en: Send the survey results data to an Amazon API Gateway endpoint that is connected to an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue. Configure the SQS queue to invoke an AWS Lambda function that calls Amazon Lex for sentiment analysis and saves the results to an Amazon DynamoDB table. Set the TTL for all records to 365 days in the future.

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：使用 Amazon API Gateway 和 Amazon SQS 实现高效的队列处理并支持高并发。正确： AWS Lambda 可以轮询来自 SQS 队列的消息并触发 Amazon Comprehend 进行上下文分析。正确： Amazon DynamoDB 支持 TTL 功能，可以自动删除超过 365 天的记录。正确：该方案是无服务器架构，可扩展性高，维护成本低。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: Use Amazon API Gateway and Amazon SQS to achieve efficient queue processing and support high concurrency. Correct: AWS Lambda can poll messages from an SQS queue and trigger Amazon Comprehend for contextual analysis. Correct: Amazon DynamoDB supports TTL functionality to automatically delete records older than 365 days. Correct: This solution is a serverless architecture with high scalability and low maintenance costs.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：使用 Amazon EC2 实例运行 API 需要移动管理服务器，从而增加了操作复杂性。错误：虽然 EC2 实例运行良好，但它们的扩展性不如 Lambda 等无服务器架构。正确： Amazon DynamoDB 支持 TTL 功能，但该解决方案总体效率低下且可扩展性较差。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Running the API using Amazon EC2 instances requires moving the management server, adding operational complexity. Error: While EC2 instances work fine, they don't scale as well as serverless architectures like Lambda. Correct: Amazon DynamoDB supports TTL functionality, but the solution is overall inefficient and not very scalable.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： Amazon Rekognition 是一项用于图像和视频分析的服务，不适合情境分析。更正： S3事件通知可以触发Lambda函数，但案例分析的服务选择错误。错误：使用 S3 生命周期策略来管理数据过期并不像 DynamoDB 的 TTL 功能那样无缝。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon Rekognition is a service for image and video analysis and is not suitable for situational analysis. Correction: S3 event notifications can trigger Lambda functions, but the service selection for case analysis is wrong. Error: Using S3 lifecycle policies to manage data expiration is not as seamless as DynamoDB's TTL feature.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： Amazon Lex 是一种用于构建简单界面的服务，不适合进行情境分析。正确：使用API​​网关和SQS队列可以实现高效的查询处理。错误：情感分析服务选择不正确。您应该使用 Amazon Comprehend。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon Lex is a service for building simple interfaces and is not suitable for situational analysis. Correct: Efficient query processing can be achieved using API Gateway and SQS queues. Error: Incorrect sentiment analysis service selection. You should use Amazon Comprehend.

answer_text.zh: A. 将调查结果数据发送到连接到 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) 队列的 Amazon API Gateway 终端节点。创建一个 AWS Lambda 函数来轮询 SQS 队列，调用 Amazon Comprehend 进行情绪分析，并将结果保存到 Amazon DynamoDB 表。将所有记录的 TTL 设置为未来 365 天。
answer_text.en: A. Send the survey results data to an Amazon API Gateway endpoint that is connected to an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue. Create an AWS Lambda function to poll the SQS queue, call Amazon Comprehend for sentiment analysis, and save the results to an Amazon DynamoDB table. Set the TTL for all records to 365 days in the future.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： A (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：使用 Amazon API Gateway 和 Amazon SQS 实现高效的队列处理并支持高并发。正确： AWS Lambda 可以轮询来自 SQS 队列的消息并触发 Amazon Comprehend 进行上下文分析。正确： Amazon DynamoDB 支持 TTL 功能，可以自动删除超过 365 天的记录。正确：该方案是无服务器架构，可扩展性高，维护成本低。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Use Amazon API Gateway and Amazon SQS to achieve efficient queue processing and support high concurrency. Correct: AWS Lambda can poll messages from an SQS queue and trigger Amazon Comprehend for contextual analysis. Correct: Amazon DynamoDB supports TTL functionality to automatically delete records older than 365 days. Correct: This solution is a serverless architecture with high scalability and low maintenance costs.

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司使用 AWS Systems Manager 对 Amazon EC2 实例进行日常管理和修补。 EC2 实例位于应用程序负载均衡器 (ALB) 后面的 IP 地址类型目标组中。新的安全协议要求公司在补丁期间从服务中删除 EC2 实例。当公司尝试在下一个补丁期间遵循安全协议时，公司会在补丁窗口期间收到错误。哪种解决方案组合可以解决这些错误？ （选择两个。）
question_text.en: A company uses AWS Systems Manager for routine management and patching of Amazon EC2 instances. The EC2 instances are in an IP address type target group behind an Application Load Balancer (ALB). New security protocols require the company to remove EC2 instances from service during a patch. When the company attempts to follow the security protocol during the next patch, the company receives errors during the patching window. Which combination of solutions will resolve the errors? (Choose two.)

A.zh: 将目标组的目标类型从IP地址类型更改为实例类型。
A.en: Change the target type of the target group from IP address type to instance type.

B.zh: 继续使用现有 Systems Manager 文档而不进行任何更改，因为它已经过优化，可以处理 ALB 后面的 IP 地址类型目标组中的实例。
B.en: Continue to use the existing Systems Manager document without changes because it is already optimized to handle instances that are in an IP address type target group behind an ALB.

C.zh: 实施 AWSEC2-PatchLoadBalancerInstance Systems Manager 自动化文档来管理修补过程。
C.en: Implement the AWSEC2-PatchLoadBalanacerInstance Systems Manager Automation document to manage the patching process.

D.zh: 使用 Systems Manager 维护窗口自动从服务中删除实例以修补实例。
D.en: Use Systems Manager Maintenance Windows to automatically remove the instances from service to patch the instances.

E.zh: 配置 Systems Manager 状态管理器以从服务中删除实例并管理修补计划。使用 ALB 运行状况检查重新路由流量。
E.en: Configure Systems Manager State Manager to remove the instances from service and manage the patching schedule. Use ALB health checks to re-route traffic.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：更改目标组类型可能会影响现有架构和配置。问题没有提到需要更改目标组类型，问题的核心是打补丁时如何正确管理流量，而不是目标组类型。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Changing the target group type may affect existing schema and configuration. The question doesn't mention the need to change the target group type, the core of the question is how to properly manage traffic when patching, not the target group type.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：问题明确指出当前的修补过程会导致错误，因此继续使用现有文档并不能解决问题。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The question clearly states that the current patching process causes errors, so continuing to use the existing documentation does not solve the problem.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因： AWSEC2-PatchLoadBalancerInstance 是一个自动化文档，专门用于管理负载均衡器后端实例的修补，确保在修补期间正确删除实例并重新加入到服务中。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: AWSEC2-PatchLoadBalancerInstance is an automation document specifically designed to manage the patching of load balancer backend instances, ensuring that instances are properly removed and rejoined into the service during patching.

D.zh: 正確。技术原因：维护时段允许您定义修补时间窗口，并自动从修补服务中删除实例以满足问题要求。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: Maintenance windows allow you to define a time window for patching and automatically remove instances from the service for patching to satisfy issue requirements.

E.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：虽然状态管理器可以管理配置和修补，但它并非旨在处理负载均衡器后端实例的修补过程。使用 ALB 运行状况检查来重新路由流量是一种补充措施，但问题需要在修补过程中解决。
E.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: While the state manager can manage configuration and patching, it is not designed to handle the patching process of load balancer backend instances. Using ALB health checks to reroute traffic is a complementary measure, but the problem needs to be addressed during patching.

answer_text.zh: C. 实施 AWSEC2-PatchLoadBalancerInstance Systems Manager 自动化文档来管理修补过程。；D. 使用 Systems Manager 维护窗口自动从服务中删除实例以修补实例。
answer_text.en: C. Implement the AWSEC2-PatchLoadBalanacerInstance Systems Manager Automation document to manage the patching process.; D. Use Systems Manager Maintenance Windows to automatically remove the instances from service to patch the instances.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： CD (93%) 7%。热门讨论与考点摘要： AWSEC2-PatchLoadBalancerInstance 是一个自动化文档，专门用于管理负载均衡器后端实例的修补，确保在修补期间正确删除实例并重新加入到服务中。；维护时段允许您定义修补时间窗口，并自动从修补服务中删除实例以满足问题要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: CD (93%) 7%. Popular discussion and key point summary: AWSEC2-PatchLoadBalancerInstance is an automation document specifically designed to manage the patching of load balancer backend instances, ensuring that instances are properly removed and rejoined into the service during patching.; Maintenance windows allow you to define a time window for patching and automatically remove instances from the service for patching to satisfy issue requirements.

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家医疗公司希望对来自多个客户的大量临床试验数据进行转换。公司必须从包含客户数据的关系数据库中提取数据。然后该公司将使用一系列复杂的规则来转换数据。转换完成后，该公司会将数据加载到 Amazon S3。在公司将数据存储在 Amazon S3 中之前，所有数据都必须在处理时进行加密。所有数据都必须使用客户特定的密钥进行加密。哪种解决方案能够以最少的运营工作量满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A medical company wants to perform transformations on a large amount of clinical trial data that comes from several customers. The company must extract the data from a relational database that contains the customer data. Then the company will transform the data by using a series of complex rules. The company will load the data to Amazon S3 when the transformations are complete. All data must be encrypted where it is processed before the company stores the data in Amazon S3. All data must be encrypted by using customer-specific keys. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST amount of operational effort?

A.zh: 为每位客户创建一个 AWS Glue 作业。将安全配置附加到每个作业，该作业使用服务器端加密和 Amazon S3 托管密钥 (SSE-S3) 来加密数据。
A.en: Create one AWS Glue job for each customer. Attach a security configuration to each job that uses server-side encryption with Amazon S3 managed keys (SSE-S3) to encrypt the data.

B.zh: 为每位客户创建一个 Amazon EMR 集群。将安全配置附加到每个集群，该集群使用客户端加密和自定义客户端根密钥 (CSE-Custom) 来加密数据。
B.en: Create one Amazon EMR cluster for each customer. Attach a security configuration to each cluster that uses client-side encryption with a custom client-side root key (CSE-Custom) to encrypt the data.

C.zh: 为每位客户创建一个 AWS Glue 作业。将安全配置附加到每个作业，该作业使用客户端加密和 AWS KMS 托管密钥 (CSE-KMS) 来加密数据。
C.en: Create one AWS Glue job for each customer. Attach a security configuration to each job that uses client-side encryption with AWS KMS managed keys (CSE-KMS) to encrypt the data.

D.zh: 为每位客户创建一个 Amazon EMR 集群。将安全配置附加到每个集群，该集群使用带有 AWS KMS 密钥 (SSE-KMS) 的服务器端加密来加密数据。
D.en: Create one Amazon EMR cluster for each customer. Attach a security configuration to each cluster that uses server-side encryption with AWS KMS keys (SSE-KMS) to encrypt the data.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： SSE-S3 使用 Amazon S3 托管密钥，不能为每位客户使用客户特定密钥，因此不符合加密要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: SSE-S3 uses Amazon S3 managed keys and cannot provide a customer-specific key for each customer, so it does not meet the encryption requirement.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： CSE-Custom 可以使用客户特定密钥，但为每位客户运行和管理 Amazon EMR 集群会增加运营工作量，不满足最少运营工作的要求。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: CSE-Custom can use customer-specific keys, but running and managing an Amazon EMR cluster for each customer adds operational effort and does not meet the least-operations requirement.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因： AWS Glue 是完全托管的 ETL 服务。为每位客户配置使用 CSE-KMS 的 Glue 作业，可在处理过程中使用客户特定的 AWS KMS 密钥加密数据，并将运营工作量降至最低。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: AWS Glue is a fully managed ETL service. Configuring each customer’s Glue job with CSE-KMS encrypts data during processing with a customer-specific AWS KMS key while minimizing operational effort.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： SSE-KMS 可使用 AWS KMS 密钥，但为每位客户创建和管理 Amazon EMR 集群会带来较高的运营开销；而且服务器端加密不满足题目指定的处理阶段客户端加密方案。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: SSE-KMS can use AWS KMS keys, but creating and managing an Amazon EMR cluster for each customer adds significant operational overhead. Server-side encryption also does not provide the specified client-side encryption during processing.

answer_text.zh: C. 为每位客户创建一个 AWS Glue 作业。将安全配置附加到每个作业，该作业使用客户端加密和 AWS KMS 托管密钥 (CSE-KMS) 来加密数据。
answer_text.en: C. Create one AWS Glue job for each customer. Attach a security configuration to each job that uses client-side encryption with AWS KMS managed keys (CSE-KMS) to encrypt the data.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： C (89%) 5%。热门讨论与考点摘要： AWS Glue 是完全托管的 ETL 服务。为每位客户配置使用 CSE-KMS 的 Glue 作业，可在处理过程中使用客户特定的 AWS KMS 密钥加密数据，并将运营工作量降至最低。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (89%) 5%. Popular discussion and key point summary: AWS Glue is a fully managed ETL service. Configuring each customer’s Glue job with CSE-KMS encrypts data during processing with a customer-specific AWS KMS key while minimizing operational effort.

questions.domain: 領域 4：設計成本優化架構 (Design Cost-Optimized Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司在单个 Amazon EC2 按需型实例上托管网站分析应用程序。该分析应用程序具有高度弹性，并且设计为在无状态模式下运行。该公司注意到该应用程序在繁忙时间显示出性能下降的迹象，并出现 5xx 错误。公司需要使应用程序无缝扩展。哪种解决方案能够最具成本效益地满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company hosts a website analytics application on a single Amazon EC2 On-Demand Instance. The analytics application is highly resilient and is designed to run in stateless mode. The company notices that the application is showing signs of performance degradation during busy times and is presenting 5xx errors. The company needs to make the application scale seamlessly. Which solution will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

A.zh: 创建 Web 应用程序的 Amazon 机器映像 (AMI)。使用 AMI 启动第二个 EC2 按需型实例。使用应用程序负载均衡器在两个 EC2 实例之间分配负载。
A.en: Create an Amazon Machine Image (AMI) of the web application. Use the AMI to launch a second EC2 On-Demand Instance. Use an Application Load Balancer to distribute the load across the two EC2 instances.

B.zh: 创建 Web 应用程序的 Amazon 机器映像 (AMI)。使用 AMI 启动第二个 EC2 按需型实例。使用 Amazon Route 53 加权路由在两个 EC2 实例之间分配负载。
B.en: Create an Amazon Machine Image (AMI) of the web application. Use the AMI to launch a second EC2 On-Demand Instance. Use Amazon Route 53 weighted routing to distribute the load across the two EC2 instances.

C.zh: 创建 AWS Lambda 函数来停止 EC2 实例并更改实例类型。创建 Amazon CloudWatch 警报以在 CPU 利用率超过 75% 时调用 Lambda 函数。
C.en: Create an AWS Lambda function to stop the EC2 instance and change the instance type. Create an Amazon CloudWatch alarm to invoke the Lambda function when CPU utilization is more than 75%.

D.zh: 创建 Web 应用程序的 Amazon 机器映像 (AMI)。将 AMI 应用到启动模板。创建包含启动模板的 Auto Scaling 组。配置启动模板以使用 竞价型实例集。将应用程序负载均衡器附加到 Auto Scaling 组。
D.en: Create an Amazon Machine Image (AMI) of the web application. Apply the AMI to a launch template. Create an Auto Scaling group that includes the launch template. Configure the launch template to use a Spot Fleet. Attach an Application Load Balancer to the Auto Scaling group.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：分析：此选项可以通过添加 EC2 实例并使用应用程序负载均衡器分配流量来解决性能问题。缺点：使用按需型实例成本较高，没有动态扩展能力。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Correctness: This option can resolve performance issues by adding EC2 instances and using an Application Load Balancer to distribute traffic. Disadvantages: The cost of using On-Demand instances is high and there is no dynamic expansion capability.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：分析：该选项使用Route 53加权路由来分配流量，但Route 53不适合实时流量负载均衡。缺点：没有动态扩展能力，使用按需型实例成本较高。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Correctness: This option uses Route 53 weighted routing to distribute traffic, but Route 53 is not suitable for real-time traffic load balancing. Disadvantages: There is no dynamic expansion capability, and the cost of using On-Demand instances is high.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：分析：此选项通过更改实例类型解决性能问题。缺点：无法动态扩展，更改实例类型可能会导致短暂的停机。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Correctness: This option resolves performance issues by changing the instance type. Disadvantages: Cannot scale dynamically, changing instance types may cause brief downtime.

D.zh: 正確。技术原因：分析：此选项使用 Auto Scaling 组进行动态扩展，使用 竞价型实例来降低成本，并通过 Application Load Balancer 分配流量。优点：性价比最高，支持无缝扩展，可用性高。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: Correctness: This option uses Auto Scaling groups for dynamic scaling, uses Spot Instances to reduce costs, and distributes traffic through an Application Load Balancer. Advantages: Most cost-effective, supports seamless expansion, and high availability.

answer_text.zh: D. 创建 Web 应用程序的 Amazon 机器映像 (AMI)。将 AMI 应用到启动模板。创建包含启动模板的 Auto Scaling 组。配置启动模板以使用 竞价型实例集。将应用程序负载均衡器附加到 Auto Scaling 组。
answer_text.en: D. Create an Amazon Machine Image (AMI) of the web application. Apply the AMI to a launch template. Create an Auto Scaling group that includes the launch template. Configure the launch template to use a Spot Fleet. Attach an Application Load Balancer to the Auto Scaling group.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： D (75%) A (25%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：分析：此选项使用 Auto Scaling 组进行动态扩展，使用 竞价型实例来降低成本，并通过 Application Load Balancer 分配流量。优点：性价比最高，支持无缝扩展，可用性高。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (75%) A (25%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Correctness: This option uses Auto Scaling groups for dynamic scaling, uses Spot Instances to reduce costs, and distributes traffic through an Application Load Balancer. Advantages: Most cost-effective, supports seamless expansion, and high availability.

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司运行的环境中的数据存储在 Amazon S3 存储桶中。这些物品全天被频繁访问。该公司对存储在S3存储桶中的数据有严格的数据加密要求。该公司目前使用 AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) 进行加密。该公司希望优化与加密 S3 对象相关的成本，而不需要额外调用 AWS KMS。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company runs an environment where data is stored in an Amazon S3 bucket. The objects are accessed frequently throughout the day. The company has strict da ta encryption requirements for data that is stored in the S3 bucket. The company currently uses AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) for encryption. The company wants to optimize costs associated with encrypting S3 objects without making additional calls to AWS KMS. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 使用带有 Amazon S3 托管密钥 (SSE-S3) 的服务器端加密。
A.en: Use server-side encryption with Amazon S3 managed keys (SSE-S3).

B.zh: 使用 S3 存储桶密钥通过 AWS KMS 密钥 (SSE-KMS) 对新对象进行服务器端加密。
B.en: Use an S3 Bucket Key for server-side encryption with AWS KMS keys (SSE-KMS) on the new objects.

C.zh: 将客户端加密与 AWS KMS 客户管理的密钥结合使用。
C.en: Use client-side encryption with AWS KMS customer managed keys.

D.zh: 使用存储在 AWS KMS 中的客户提供的密钥 (SSE-C) 进行服务器端加密。
D.en: Use server-side encryption with customer-provided keys (SSE-C) stored in AWS KMS.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：使用 Amazon S3 托管密钥的服务器端加密 (SSE-S3) 错误。 SSE-S3 使用 Amazon S3 托管密钥进行加密。虽然它满足加密需求，但它不使用 AWS KMS，因此不满足问题中提到的“当前使用 AWS KMS”要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Server-side encryption (SSE-S3) error using Amazon S3 managed keys. SSE-S3 uses Amazon S3 managed keys for encryption. While it meets the encryption needs, it does not use AWS KMS and therefore does not meet the "currently using AWS KMS" requirement mentioned in the question.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：使用 S3 存储桶密钥和 AWS KMS 密钥对新对象进行服务器端加密 (SSE-KMS) 是正确的。 SSE-KMS使用AWS KMS进行加密，满足问题要求。启用 S3 Bucket Key 可减少对 AWS KMS 的调用，同时仍满足严格的加密要求，从而优化成本。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: It is correct to use an S3 bucket key and an AWS KMS key for server-side encryption (SSE-KMS) of new objects. SSE-KMS uses AWS KMS for encryption, which meets the question requirements. Enabling S3 Bucket Key optimizes costs by reducing calls to AWS KMS while still meeting strict encryption requirements.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：使用 AWS KMS 客户管理的密钥时出现客户端加密错误。客户端加密需要在客户端进行加密和解密操作，增加了复杂度，不符合问题中“成本优化”的要求。此外，客户端加密不涉及 S3 的服务器端加密选项。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Client-side encryption error using AWS KMS customer-managed keys. Client-side encryption requires encryption and decryption operations on the client, which increases complexity and does not meet the "cost optimization" requirements in the question. Additionally, client-side encryption does not involve S3's server-side encryption options.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：使用 AWS KMS 中存储的客户提供的密钥时会发生服务器端加密 (SSE-C) 错误。 SSE-C 要求客户提供自己的加密密钥，并且这些密钥不存储在 AWS KMS 中。这与题目中提到的“当前使用AWS KMS”的要求不一致。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: A server-side encryption (SSE-C) error occurs when using customer-provided keys stored in AWS KMS. SSE-C requires customers to provide their own encryption keys, and these keys are not stored in AWS KMS. This is inconsistent with the requirement of "currently using AWS KMS" mentioned in the title.

answer_text.zh: B. 使用 S3 存储桶密钥通过 AWS KMS 密钥 (SSE-KMS) 对新对象进行服务器端加密。
answer_text.en: B. Use an S3 Bucket Key for server-side encryption with AWS KMS keys (SSE-KMS) on the new objects.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： B (74%) A (26%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：使用 S3 存储桶密钥和 AWS KMS 密钥对新对象进行服务器端加密 (SSE-KMS) 是正确的。 SSE-KMS使用AWS KMS进行加密，满足问题要求。启用 S3 Bucket Key 可减少对 AWS KMS 的调用，同时仍满足严格的加密要求，从而优化成本。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (74%) A (26%). Popular discussion and key point summary: It is correct to use an S3 bucket key and an AWS KMS key for server-side encryption (SSE-KMS) of new objects. SSE-KMS uses AWS KMS for encryption, which meets the question requirements. Enabling S3 Bucket Key optimizes costs by reducing calls to AWS KMS while still meeting strict encryption requirements.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司在本地数据中心的虚拟机 (VM) 上运行多个工作负载。公司正在迅速扩张。本地数据中心无法快速扩展以满足业务需求。该公司希望将工作负载迁移到 AWS。迁移具有时间敏感性。该公司希望对非关键工作负载使用直接迁移策略。哪种步骤组合可以满足这些要求？ （选择三项。）
question_text.en: A company runs multiple workloads on virtual machines (VMs) in an on-premises data center. The company is expanding rapidly. The on-premises data center is not able to scale fast enough to meet business needs. The company wants to migrate the workloads to AWS. The migration is time sensitive. The company wants to use a lift-and-shift strategy for non-critical workloads. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose three.)

A.zh: 使用 AWS Schema Conversion Tool (AWS SCT) 收集有关虚拟机的数据。
A.en: Use the AWS Schema Conversion Tool (AWS SCT) to collect data about the VMs.

B.zh: 使用 AWS 应用程序迁移服务。在虚拟机上安装 AWS Replication Agent。
B.en: Use AWS Application Migration Service. Install the AWS Replication Agent on the VMs.

C.zh: 完成虚拟机的初始复制。启动测试实例以在虚拟机上执行验收测试。
C.en: Complete the initial replication of the VMs. Launch test instances to perform acceptance tests on the VMs.

D.zh: 停止虚拟机上的所有操作。启动切换实例。
D.en: Stop all operations on the VMs. Launch a cutover instance.

E.zh: 使用 AWS App2Container (A2C) 收集有关虚拟机的数据。
E.en: Use AWS App2Container (A2C) to collect data about the VMs.

F.zh: 使用 AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) 迁移虚拟机。
F.en: Use AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) to migrate the VMs.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： AWS Schema Conversion Tool (AWS SCT) 主要用于数据库迁移，而不是虚拟机迁移。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS Schema Conversion Tool (AWS SCT) is primarily used for database migration, not virtual machine migration.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因： AWS Application Migration Service 是专门为迁移虚拟机而设计的服务。安装 AWS Replication Agent 是迁移所需的步骤。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: AWS Application Migration Service is a service designed specifically for migrating virtual machines. Installing AWS Replication Agent is a required step for migration.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：初始副本完成后，启动测试实例进行验收测试是迁移过程中确保迁移的工作负载正常运行的重要步骤。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: After the initial copy is complete, launching a test instance for acceptance testing is an important step in the migration process to ensure that the migrated workloads are running properly.

D.zh: 正確。技术原因：迁移完成后，停止源虚拟机上的操作并启动切换实例是迁移的最后一步，以确保工作负载切换到AWS环境。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: After the migration is complete, stopping operations on the source virtual machine and starting the switch instance is the final step of the migration to ensure that the workload is switched to the AWS environment.

E.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： AWS App2Container (A2C) 用于容器化应用程序，而不是虚拟机迁移。
E.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS App2Container (A2C) is used for containerized applications, not virtual machine migration.

F.zh: 錯誤。技术原因： AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) 用于数据库迁移，而不是虚拟机迁移。
F.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) is used for database migration, not virtual machine migration.

answer_text.zh: B. 使用 AWS 应用程序迁移服务。在虚拟机上安装 AWS Replication Agent。；C. 完成虚拟机的初始复制。启动测试实例以在虚拟机上执行验收测试。；D. 停止虚拟机上的所有操作。启动切换实例。
answer_text.en: B. Use AWS Application Migration Service. Install the AWS Replication Agent on the VMs.; C. Complete the initial replication of the VMs. Launch test instances to perform acceptance tests on the VMs.; D. Stop all operations on the VMs. Launch a cutover instance.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果： BCD (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要： AWS Application Migration Service 是专门为迁移虚拟机而设计的服务。安装 AWS Replication Agent 是迁移所需的步骤。；初始副本完成后，启动测试实例进行验收测试是迁移过程中确保迁移的工作负载正常运行的重要步骤。；迁移完成后，停止源虚拟机上的操作并启动切换实例是迁移的最后一步，以确保工作负载切换到AWS环境。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: BCD (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: AWS Application Migration Service is a service designed specifically for migrating virtual machines. Installing AWS Replication Agent is a required step for migration.; After the initial copy is complete, launching a test instance for acceptance testing is an important step in the migration process to ensure that the migrated workloads are running properly.; After the migration is complete, stopping operations on the source virtual machine and starting the switch instance is the final step of the migration to ensure that the workload is switched to the AWS environment.
